reviews.comment:
Lugar estrategico para descansar un rato y relajarse en algun viaje. Todos los servicios a disposicion de los usuarios!!!

(Translated by Google)
A strategic location to rest and relax during your trip. All services are available to guests!

reviews.comment:
Excelente parador.Amplia sombra con muchos arboles. Podes bajar a tu mascota en el parque. Parrila para comer a socios y no socios. Baños limpios.recomendamos

(Translated by Google)
Excellent rest stop. Plenty of shade with many trees. You can let your pet out in the park. Grill for members and non-members. Clean restrooms. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnMDZpLUt3EAE
